## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation (README, docs/, FAQ, CHANGELOG, etc.)
- [ ] Metadata (info.json, tokenlist.json, token-metadata.json)
- [ ] Asset (logo, social card, etc.)
- [ ] Script (scripts/)
- [ ] Translation (added or updated a non-English version)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I have **not** modified the Solidity sources in `contracts/`. The on-chain contracts are immutable and changes there cannot be reflected on-chain. Improvements to the protocol should be a separate fork.
- [ ] If I added a translation, I linked to it from the main `README.md`.
- [ ] If I changed metadata, the address fields are EIP-55 checksummed.
- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
